headline: 41M DOGE Transferred In One Go As Dogecoin Trades Higher
summary: Over 40 million Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) were moved from an unknown address to an unknown wallet in a single transaction earlier on Sunday.

headline: Bigger Than The iPhone? Apple Trademark Filing Hints Augmented Reality Around The Corner
summary: Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) appears to be approaching the release of a product line that could rival the iPhone, according to a trademark filing.

headline: Predicted Features Of Apple's iOS 16 Ahead Of Unveiling At WWDC
summary: Apple, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) will hold its  annual Worldwide Developers Conference from June 6-10, with the keynote scheduled for Monday.

headline: CNBC's Final Trades: Costco Wholesale, Zoetis, BlackBerry, Walt Disney And This Energy Stock
summary: On CNBC’s “Halftime Report Final Trades,” Richard Saperstein of HighTower Treasury Partners said he loved Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ: COST).

headline: The Final Call: Time To Short Consumer Staples, Go Long On Netflix And This Energy Stock
summary: On CNBC's "The Final Call," Carter Worth said he was a seller of consumer staples.

headline: Poll Pitting AOC Against Elon Musk Backfires: Here's Which One Is More Trusted By Twitter Users
summary: The world’s richest man is no stranger to polling his users on Twitter Inc (NYSE: TWTR) to prove his points or opinions. A poll was put forth on Twitter by another user to try and show that Musk’s polls may not be accurate, but backfired. Here are the details.

headline: Rude Awakening Inbound! Elon Musk Says A Recession Is 'Actually A Good Thing'
summary:
Recession fears have been growing in the U.S. as the Federal Reserve has tightened its monetary policy. 

Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk says the U.S. economy is already in a recession, and it could be "tough going" for 12 to 18 months.

headline: 'Top Gun: Maverick' Soars To $124M At Weekend Box Office
summary: “Top Gun: Maverick” obliterated the competition at the U.S. box office this weekend, bringing in $124 million from 4,735 theaters.

headline: Latest On Production Resumption at Apple, Tesla Supplier's Shanghai Plants
summary: With the COVID-19 situation in Shanghai improving, suppliers of U.S. big techs have gradually begun to ramp up production to pre-COVID levels.

headline: Elon Musk Gives This Piece Of Advice To Ex-Girlfriend Amber Heard And Johnny Depp
summary:
Actor Johnny Depp and Amber Heard’s defamation trial came to a close on Friday as both parties rested their case. The judge then handed the case over to the jury. 

Jurors are expected to evaluate the case and deliver the verdict next week.

headline: Elon Musk On Tesla's Long-Term Growth: Why It Hasn't Even Reached 0.1% Of Future Potential
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) is now seen as more than a car company, given its  foray into energy, AI and robotics.
